projects.name: Food Box Rehabilitation
projects.description: Rehabilitation of the Food Box. Imported from priced BOQ workbook.

boq.item: A. Provide for the mobilization and demobilization of all necessary labour, materials, and equipment to and from the site, including all associated costs and logistics. Ensure that the project area and its surroundings are fully reinstated to their original condition prior to handover
B. Allow for the provision of all required Personal Protective Equipment (PPE), including contractor-supplied scaffolds and ladders, and ensure full compliance with all Zambia Sugar SHEQ requirements
A. Carefully remove all wooden doors along with existing mortice lock sets and handover to client
B. Careully remove existing window frames, door frames and barglars and handover to client
C. Carefully isolate power supply and remove all socket, Switch and light fittings together, handover to client and make good disturbed surfaces to receive new socket
D. Carefully all shelvings , and all other floor mounted cabinets, counter tops and handover to client and prepare to receive new units
E. Carefully remove all sanitary fittings including the double bowl sink, geyser and the like, and handover to client and prepare to receive new fittings
F. Carefully remove existing ceiling, and handover to client and prepare to receive new specified ceiling
G. Carefully hack out all tiles including skirting and prepare surface to receive new floor tiles
H. Careully remove existing window frames, door frames and barglars and handover to client
I. Carefully secure the LED screen adjacent to the structure and reinstate it to its original position
J. Attend to builder's works to all trades e,g repairing of cracks, not measured elsewhere internally and externally as guided by the engineer.

K. Demolish existing brick or block walls of any thickness, including breaking down, removing all debris from the site, and restoring adjoining structures as necessary. All work to be carried out as directed by the Project Manager, with disposal of waste at an authorized dump site(Chulu dump site)
A. Excavating oversite average 150mm deep to remove top soil and disposal from site
B. Excavate trench to receive foundations commencing at reduced level and not exceeding 1.50m deep
C. Backfilling to foundations with materials arising from the excavations deposited and compacted in layers maximum 100mm thick
D. Disposal of surplus excavated materials off site
E. Compact bottom of foundation trenches
F. Allow for planking and strutting to sides of all excavations
G. Allow for keeping excavation free from general water
H. Allow for removal of termite nests
I. 15 Doidrin or equal and approved ant-termite treatment to all horizontal and vertical surfaces of excavations
J. 150mm thick bed of hardcore laid level and well compacted to AASHO MOD 98%
K. 50mm thick sand blinding on top of hardcore
L. Ditto: on foundation surfaces
M. 15 Doidrin or equal and approved ant-termite treatment to the surface of the hardcore filling
N. 500g polythene membrane laid on sand blinding (measured net)
O. 100mm thick slab laid level
P. Concrete in trench foundations
A. One layer of conforce '86' or other equal and approved fabric reinforcement in concrete bed with minimum laps of 150mm (no allowance made for laps)
B. Edges of floor slab not exceeding 100mm high
C. 200mm thick (nominal) solid blockwall
D. 2M built in between 200mm thick blockwork every second course
E. Blockwalls of plinth
F. Plastered walls of plinth
A. Ring beam and lintels
B. To sides and soffits of lintels
C. 8mm diameter High yield steel bars
D. 12mm diameter high yield steel bars
A. 150mm thick hollow blockwall
B. Brick on edge window sill in cement mortar 1:4
C. 1.5M brickforce built in 200mm thick blockwork every third course
D. To 150mm blockwall
E. 200 x 200mm square hole pattern UPVC air brick with insect proof gauze at back and built into wall including making hole size 200 x 200mm through 200mm blockwalls and making good finishing around
A. Roof sheets fixed to timber trusses (measured separately)
B. Cranked ridge capping
A. 8mm thikc particle board nailed onto 50mm x 50mm softwood branderng at 600mm centers complete with cover strips and cover cornices (brandering measured seperately)
B. 44mm (finished) door size 825 x 1960mm hung on butts to metal frame (measured separately)
C. 225 x 25mm wrot softwood to rafters
D. 150 x 50mm raftres, ceiling joists, struts and ties
E. 100 x 50mm wall plate
F. 75 x 50mm purlins
G. 50 x 50mm brandering
H. Two lever mortice lock with chromium plated finished for-end and set of chromium plated finished lever handle furniture fixed to door

I. Supply and install high gloss white modular kitchen units with carcases made from durable MDF board, including base cabinets, wall-mounted cabinets, and drawer units. Units to be complete with soft-close hinges, handles, and all necessary fittings. Provide and install polished 30mm thick black granite countertops, including precision cutouts for appliances and sinks, securely fixed using appropriate adhesives and sealants. The work includes the installation of integrated appliances, completion of all required plumbing and electrical connections, and ensuring all surfaces are aligned, polished, and finished to a high standard. Include all fasteners, brackets, trims, and sealants, with final testing and adjustments to meet the approved design and specifications.(to include the counter top for the point of sale)

J. Supply and install heavy-duty steel kitchen shelving brackets, L-shaped design with reinforced ribs, powder-coated finish for corrosion resistance, size approximately 300 mm x 300 mm (or as specified), capable of supporting 20–50 kg per bracket. Complete with pre-drilled holes, screws, and wall plugs for secure fixing.
K. 18mm thick blockboards shelving suitable for painting
L. 12x12mm wrot hardwood lipping glued and pinned to edges of the shelves

A. Supply and install high-quality roller blinds for windows, made from durable fabric with UV protection, complete with aluminum top rail, chain control mechanism, and all necessary brackets and fittings. Blinds to be custom-fitted to window size.
B. 38mm diameter rubber door stop plugged and screwed to floors
C. Supply and install Aluminium under door seal
A. Type 1.5 M, nominal size 900 x 2000mm
B. Window overall size 2000 width x 1000mm high
A. 19mm diameter pipes
B. 13mm diameter pipes
water heater with 19mm diametre inlet and outlet, monarch type
D. 19mm diameter brass screw down stop valve with capstan head and joints to 19mm diameter pipe
E. 13mm diameter brass screw down stop valve with capstan head and joints to 13mm diameter pipe
F. 13mm diameter copper connector, 300mm girth bent as required with joint to union of fitting and other galvanised mild steel and uPVC pipes
G. Cobra water tech 19mm swivel type chromium plated sink mixer
H. Allow for all the plumbing fittings(extra over pieces)
J. 110 mm diameter waste pipe
K. 50mm diameter waste pipe
L. Allow for all the plumbing fittings(extra over pipes)

M. RO 200 SV NW 100 under floor drain complete with 50mm diameter 'P' trap and 110mm diameter tail piece with and including coated cast iron grating including surrounding, fixed to UPVC drain pipes, etc.

A. 110mm diameter Gulley 'P' trap with and including coated cast iron grating including surrounding, with 150mm thick built up wall on all four sides of the gully trap, rendering in c : m 1 :3 , concealed with concrete cover slab , thickness 100mm with medium duty manhole cover including all excavation and disposal as described fixed to UPVC drain pipes
B. Armitage shanks vitreous china wash hand basin with 32mm chromium plated outlet, plugs, chain and pair of 13mm "Cobra" water tech" pillar taps the whole neatly fixed on the granite counter top.
C. Standard double bowl stainless steel sink complete with 32mm waste, plug, chain and 13mm sink mixer the whole mounted to floor and wall(sink mixture measured separately)
D. Include for sterilization of entire of the water system to Architects satisfaction
E. Including for testing the whole of the plumbing installation on completion by means of a pressure test to one and a half times the working pressure
F. Hole through 200mm blockwall for small pipes and make good

G. 700W x 700L x 5000mm deep Manhole complete with and including 457 x 457mm concrete Manhole Cover; complete with surrounding in 150mm thick built up solid wall on all four sides, 20mm rendering in C : M 1:3; concrete haunching cover slab finished with angles including rebated opening for manhole cover; all necessary excavation, backfill and disposal
A. 12 Way TPN, Flush type lockable, white in colour, Districution Board consisting of:
B. 2 x 36W Ceiling mounted batten fluorescent light fitting 1200 mm long as 111/136/SS
C. 1 x 36W Ceiling, wall or roof mounted batten fluorescent light fitting 1200 mm long as 111/136/SS
D. 1 x 36W wall mounted batten fluorescent light fitting 1200 mm long as 111/136/SS
E. One gang one way wall switch (MK or simillar)
F. Two gang one way wall switch (MK or simillar)
A. 13 Amps Double socket outlet (MK or simillar)
B. 6 x 6 cooker control unit with pilot lamps (MK or simillar)
C. 20A geyser Switch with pilot lamp (MK or simillar)

D. Supply, deliver, install, and commission a commercial-grade stainless steel kitchen extraction hood complete with ducting, fan, and accessories. Technical Specifications: - Material: Food-grade stainless steel (SS304), 1.0 mm thickness, polished finish. - Dimensions: 1200 mm – 1500 mm wide, 600 mm deep, 450 mm high. - Filters: Stainless steel baffle-type grease filters, removable and washable. - Airflow Capacity: 800–1500 m³/hr. - Fan/Blower: Heavy-duty centrifugal fan, motor IP55 rated, low noise (65 dB), vibration isolators included. - Ducting: Galvanized steel ductwork with bends, supports, and airtight joints. - Lighting: Integrated LED lights (minimum 2 x 5W). - Electrical: Complete wiring from isolator to fan motor, including control switch. - Accessories: Drip trays, condensate drain, and mounting brackets. - Compliance: Conforms to local health and safety standards for commercial kitchens. - Installation: Includes all fixings, supports, sealing, and testing. - Testing & Commissioning: Verify airflow, noise level, and safe operation.
A. 40mm thick bed laid level on concrete bed
B. To floor areas
C. To all general areas
D. To the kitchen walls
F. 20mm coat to block walls surfaces
G. 20 mm render to small widths and reveals, girth 100mm to 200mm wide externally
I. 20mm coat to block walls surfaces
J. 20 mm render to small widths and reveals, girth 100mm to 200mm wide internally
A. To plastered walls
B. Ditto exceeding 100mm but not exceeding 200mm wide
C. To ceiling borad surfaces
D. Plastered walls
E. Ditto exceeding 100mm not exceeding 200mm wide
F. Door frame surfaces
G. Fascia board surfaces
